title: potentilla hololeuca var. pamiroalaica
intro: Potentilla hololeuca var. pamiroalaica, also known as Pamir potentilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune system function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
